message.content: This section presents a ranked financial leaderboard of the top-grossing new overseas mobile games for the full year of 2025. It provides annual revenue metrics (全年流水, in billion RMB) and associated publishers/developers for 16 titles. The data supports retrieval for queries regarding: (1) specific game rankings and exact 2025 annual revenue figures (e.g., 奔奔王国: 42.26亿元, SD钢弹G世代永恒（日服）: 20.62亿元); (2) publisher/developer attribution for top-performing new releases (e.g., 点点互动, 万代南梦宫, 网石游戏, NEXON, CyGames, FunPlus); (3) regional version performance comparisons (e.g., 日服 vs. 国际服 for SD钢弹G世代永恒); and (4) the complete top 16 revenue list for 2025 overseas mobile game launches. The section functions as a structured quantitative ranking table, containing financial metrics and entity mappings without procedural, definitional, or visual elements.
